THERESA-PIG_SLEEP.title: PigSleep
THERESA-THERESA_STRIKE.title: Theresa_strike
THERESA-THERESA_DEFEND.title: TheresaDefend
THERESA-MOTE.title: Mote
THERESA-SPOT.title: Spot
THERESA-WISH.title: Wish
THERESA-ETERNAL_DUST.title: EternalDust
THERESA-CANDLE.title: Candle
THERESA-MISALIGNMENT_INTERACTION.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When drawn: If a Dust card has lower cost, swap positions and reduce cost by [blue]1[/blue].
If Dust > [blue]8[/blue], reduce cost by an additional [blue]1[/blue].
THERESA-MISALIGNMENT_INTERACTION.title: Misalignment|Interaction
THERESA-BORN_IN_DARKNESS.description:
Gain {ZaakathHatePower:diff()} Hate.
If you have MemorySilk: Consume 1 MemorySilk, remove 3 Hate, gain 1 Hope.
THERESA-BORN_IN_DARKNESS.title: BornInDarkness
THERESA-KAZDEL_IN_FLAMES.description: Whenever you play an Attack card, gain {ZaakathHatePower:diff()} Hate.
THERESA-KAZDEL_IN_FLAMES.title: KazdelInFlames
THERESA-WHERE_IS_HOME.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If not played this turn, gain {Backlash:diff()} Backlash.
THERESA-WHERE_IS_HOME.title: WhereIsHome
THERESA-FINAL_CURTAIN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Add a Dazed to your hand.
THERESA-FINAL_CURTAIN.title: Final Curtain
THERESA-FALLING_PETAL_SEA.description:
Gain {Energy:diff()} Energy.
If you have Energy remaining before your next turn starts, gain 1 more Energy.
THERESA-FALLING_PETAL_SEA.title: Falling Petal Sea
THERESA-APOPTOSIS_COUNTDOWN.description: Whenever a card is Exhausted, apply {ApoptosisPower:diff()} Apoptosis to the enemy with the highest HP.
THERESA-APOPTOSIS_COUNTDOWN.title: Apoptosis Countdown
THERESA-APOPTOSIS_COUNTDOWN_EFFECT.descr: Whenever a card is Exhausted, apply Apoptosis to the enemy with the highest HP.
THERESA-APOPTOSIS_COUNTDOWN_EFFECT.title: Apoptosis Countdown
THERESA-APOPTOSIS_COUNTDOWN_EFFECT.smart: Whenever a card is Exhausted, apply Apoptosis to the enemy with the highest HP.
THERESA-LITTLE_TAILOR.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Return this card to your hand when played.
Apply {SilkCocoon:diff()} Silk Cocoon to ALL enemies.
THERESA-LITTLE_TAILOR.title: Little Tailor
THERESA-SILK_POEM.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Apply {SilkCocoon:diff()} Silk Cocoon to ALL enemies.
THERESA-SILK_POEM.title: Silk Poem
THERESA-DUST_OF_THE_PAST.description: Whenever you consume a Mantra, gain {Block:diff()} Block.
THERESA-DUST_OF_THE_PAST.title: Dust of the Past
THERESA-LOST_LIGHT_SHADOW.description:
Consume all Mantra.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage per stack.
Apply {ApoptosisPower:diff()} Apoptosis plus consumed Mantra stacks.
THERESA-LOST_LIGHT_SHADOW.title: Lost Light Shadow
THERESA-PAST_ECHOES_AROUND.description: At the end of your turn, gain Oblivion equal to your current Mantra stacks.
THERESA-PAST_ECHOES_AROUND.title: Past Echoes Around
THERESA-PAST_ECHOES_AROUND_EFFECT.smartD: At turn end, gain Oblivion equal to current Mantra stacks.
THERESA-PAST_ECHOES_AROUND_EFFECT.title: Past Echoes Around
THERESA-DUST_IN_HAND.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Choose up to 8 cards to discard. Gain 1 [gold]Mantra[/gold] for each discarded card.
THERESA-DUST_IN_HAND.title: Dust in Hand
THERESA-BALLADE.description:
Shuffle your Discard Pile into your Draw Pile.
Cards in your Draw Pile gain [gold]Silk Thread[/gold] and spread to adjacent cards.
THERESA-BALLADE.title: Ballade
THERESA-PAINFUL_CONNECTION.description:
Exhaust.
Whenever you apply Silk Cocoon to an enemy this turn, gain the same amount.
Silk Cocoon triggers {ExtraTriggers:diff()} additional times.
THERESA-PAINFUL_CONNECTION.title: Painful Connection
THERESA-FINALE.description: Retain. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage X times. Then play {Theresa-FinalePlayCount:diff()} cards from your hand.
THERESA-FINALE.title: Finale
THERESA-IDEAL_REFLECTION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Choose a card from your Discard Pile, add a copy to your hand.
This turn, it costs 0 and is [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
THERESA-IDEAL_REFLECTION.title: Ideal Reflection
THERESA-PETITION.description: Exhaust. Apply {Apoptosis:diff()} Apoptosis and {Cocoon:diff()} Silk Cocoon to the target.
THERESA-PETITION.title: Petition
THERESA-ECHO_FROM_PAST.description:
Exhaust. Discard your entire hand. Draw that many + {ExtraDraw:diff()} cards.
If you have no cards to discard, gain 6 [gold]Mantra[/gold].
THERESA-ECHO_FROM_PAST.title: Echo From Past
THERESA-THREAD_OF_LIFE.title: Thread of Life
THERESA-FOLLOW_THE_HISTORY.description: Whenever you play an Exhausted card, gain {MantraAmount:diff()} [gold]Mantra[/gold].
THERESA-FOLLOW_THE_HISTORY.title: Follow The History
THERESA-FOLLOW_THE_HISTORY_EFFECT.descri: Whenever you play an Exhausted card, gain {Amount} [gold]Mantra[/gold].
THERESA-FOLLOW_THE_HISTORY_EFFECT.smartD: Whenever you play an Exhausted card, gain {Amount} [gold]Mantra[/gold].
THERESA-FOLLOW_THE_HISTORY_EFFECT.title: Follow The History
THERESA-DEAD_SOUL_BREATH.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Gain {BlockAmount:diff()} Block. If different from the last played card's type, add a copy of the last played card to your hand with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] and play it for free, then apply {ApoptosisAmount:diff()} [red]Apoptosis[/red] to everyone.
THERESA-DEAD_SOUL_BREATH.title: Dead Soul Breath
THERESA-PARTING_MOMENT.description:
Lose 1 [gold]Mantra[/gold].
Increase [gold]Silk Cocoon[/gold] on ALL enemies by {CocoonAmount:diff()}. If they have none, apply 1 [gold]Silk Cocoon[/gold] first.
THERESA-PARTING_MOMENT.title: Parting Moment
THERESA-WITHER_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {ApoptosisAmount:diff()} [red]Apoptosis[/red].
If you have more than [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Mantra[/gold], apply an additional {BonusApoptosisAmount:diff()} [red]Apoptosis[/red].
THERESA-WITHER_CARD.title: Wither
THERESA-GRANT_YOU_REST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {ApoptosisAmount:diff()} [red]Apoptosis[/red].
Apply [red]Apoptosis Burst[/red].
THERESA-GRANT_YOU_REST.title: Grant You Rest
THERESA-DESPERATE_GAMBLE.description: Move all cards from your Discard Pile to your Draw Pile. For every {CardsPerDamage:diff()} cards moved, deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the target has Block, lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
THERESA-DESPERATE_GAMBLE.title: Desperate Gamble
THERESA-YUAN_QI.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards, then discard {Discard:diff()}.
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
THERESA-YUAN_QI.title: Yuan Qi
THERESA-BEFORE_DUST.description: Draw {DrawCount:diff()} cards. For each card not drawn, deal {MissDamage:diff()} damage. If all cards are drawn, gain {HitBlock:diff()} Block.
THERESA-BEFORE_DUST.title: Before Dust
THERESA-CIVILIGHT_ETERNA.description: [gold]Ethereal[/gold]. [gold]Replay[/gold] {ReplayCount:diff()} cards. They upgrade for the rest of the run.
THERESA-CIVILIGHT_ETERNA.title: Civilight Eterna
THERESA-CURE.description:
[red]Remove from this combat[/red]. For every [blue]5[/blue] HP lost, heal [red]1[/red] HP.
(Can heal {Theresa-CureTotalHeal} HP now)
When this card is [gold]removed[/gold] from your deck, increase your Max HP by [green]{MaxHpGain:diff()}[/green].
THERESA-CURE.title: Cure
THERESA-UNFORGIVABLE_SIN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each card Exhausted this combat, deal an additional {DamagePerExhaust:diff()} damage.
When played: Add a [gold]Sarkaz See[/gold] to your hand.
THERESA-UNFORGIVABLE_SIN.title: Unforgivable Sin
THERESA-WORDLESS.description: Until the end of your turn, draw becomes Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}. Draw 1 card.
THERESA-WORDLESS.title: Wordless
THERESA-STORY_TELLER.description: [gold]Ethereal[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Draw {BaseDraw} card. For each Power card in your hand, draw an additional {DrawPerPower:diff()} card.
THERESA-STORY_TELLER.title: StoryTeller
THERESA-FIX_LIFE.description: Gain {WeakAmount:diff()} [red]Weak[/red] and {VulnerableAmount:diff()} [red]Vulnerable[/red]. Your [red]Weak[/red], [red]Vulnerable[/red], and [red]Frail[/red] effects are reversed.
THERESA-FIX_LIFE.title: Fix Life
THERESA-FIX_LIFE_EFFECT.title: Fix Life
THERESA-GUARDIAN_SLASH.description:
When this card moves between piles, deal {MoveDamage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
Grant {BaseBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] to all allies. If [gold]Swordsman[/gold] is present, grant him an additional {SwordsmanBonusBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
THERESA-GUARDIAN_SLASH.title: Guardian Slash
THERESA-GUARDIAN_SLASH_BOUND.description: Heal bound [gold]{BoundMinionName}[/gold] for [green]{BaseBlockBonus:diff()}[/green] HP and grant [gold]Guardian[/gold] power.
THERESA-GUARDIAN_SLASH_BOUND.title: Guardian Slash
THERESA-THE_WISDEL.title: Ancestor Launcher: Wisdel
THERESA-THE_WISDEL.description:
Consume {DustCost:diff()} [gold]Mantra[/gold].
Summon [gold]Wisdel[/gold] ({WisdelHp:diff()} HP).
Wisdel automatically deals {WisdelDamage:diff()} damage to a random enemy each turn.
Has [gold]Generous Gift[/gold] and [gold]Aftershock[/gold].
THERESA-WISDEL_DURATION_BOUND_CARD.title: Extend
THERESA-SUFFERING.description:
Spend X {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} to gain {TheresiasHopePower:diff()} [gold]Hope[/gold] and {ZaakathHatePower:diff()} [red]Hate[/red].{IfUpgraded:show:
[green]Upgraded: Gain 3 additional Hope and Hate.[/green]|}
THERESA-SUFFERING.title: Suffering
THERESA-SOLARIS_SEA.title: Solaris Sea
THERESA-SOLARIS_SEA.description:
[gold]Non-stackable[/gold].
Whenever you play a card, choose 1 card with lower cost from your Draw Pile, add it to your hand and play it for free.
THERESA-EXTREMELY_PRECIOUS.title: Extremely Precious
THERESA-EXTREMELY_PRECIOUS.description:
Gain {BufferAmount} [gold]Buffer[/gold].
When played from hand, reduce cost of adjacent cards by {CostReduction} this turn.
THERESA-UNSEEN_FUTURE.title: Unseen Future
THERESA-ENDER_DUST.title: Ender Dust
THERESA-ENDER_DUST.description:
Gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]End Shadow[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].
When drawn: Discard and gain [gold]{Block:diff()}[/gold] Block.
